pkmn.lore: The embodiment of moon light. From the earliest ages, it has watched over sleep and dreams, bringing peaceful rest where darkness gathers. Its feathers dispel the nightmares born by Darkrai, as they balance the quiet rhythm of night that was set into the world.
The cold of winter. Air chills and frost gathers in its wake. Snowfall follows as it passes, and mountains are left sealed in ice where it lingers.

hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Damage reduced to x1.5
When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
